props.name: label
props.description: Visible label text. Always required for accessibility — even icon-only buttons need a label (use `aria-label` via `ariaLabel`).

props.name: type
props.description: Native button type. Defaults to `'button'` to avoid accidental form submits.

props.name: ariaLabel
props.description: Override the accessible name when the visible label is decorative.

props.name: onClick
props.description: Optional click handler. Wired up via `addEventListener('click', …)`.

props.name: fullWidth
props.description: Stretch to fill the parent's width.

props.name: name
props.description: Optional `name` attribute for form serialization.

props.name: value
props.description: Initial value.

props.name: state
props.description:
Initial state. Note that focus state is generally driven automatically by
`:focus-within` / `focus`/`blur` listeners; only set this explicitly if you
need to force a state without focus (e.g. inline preview screens).

props.name: type
props.description: Native input type. Ignored when `variant === 'large'`.

props.name: label
props.description: Accessible label. Either this or `ariaLabelledBy` is required.

props.name: trailingIcon
props.description: Lucide icon shown on the trailing edge (e.g. arrow indicator).

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disabled state.

props.name: readOnly
props.description: Read-only state.

props.name: onChange
props.description: Fired on every input. Receives the new value.

props.name: onFocus
props.description: Fired on focus.

props.name: onBlur
props.description: Fired on blur.

props.name: onKeyDown
props.description: Fired on keydown.

props.name: icon
props.description: Lucide icon shown on the leading edge.

props.name: action
props.description: Trailing affordance — usually a settings/edit button.

props.name: onClick
props.description: Make the entire row clickable.

props.name: interactive
props.description: Pass `true` to render as a `<button>` instead of a `<div>` (recommended when `onClick` is set).

props.name: onChange
props.description: Fires on every input.

props.name: onSubmit
props.description: Fires on Enter / submit.

props.name: onClear
props.description: Fires when the clear button is pressed.

props.name: label
props.description: Visible label. Rendered uppercase via CSS — pass natural case.

props.name: as
props.description:
Heading level — used for screen-reader semantics. Defaults to `'h3'`.
Pass `'div'` if the sub-header is purely decorative.

props.name: items
props.description: Ordered list of tabs.

props.name: activeId
props.description: Currently active tab id. Falls back to the first non-disabled tab.

props.name: ariaLabel
props.description: Accessible label for the tablist (e.g. "Plugin frame tabs").
